queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of having no known savings account to credit risk mitigation.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical determinants of increased credit default probability associated with checking account status indicating no checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the relationship between critical or other existing credit history and reduced credit risk.
